programme.title: Nitnem
programme.desc: Sikh daily prayer compiled of The Five Banis are: Japji Sahib, Jaap Sahib, Tav-Prasad Savaiye, Chaupai sahib and Anand Sahib. Sikhs recite these prayers at amrit vela. (Ambrosial period)

programme.title: Shukrana Sehaj Paath

programme.title: Sustainable Energy
programme.desc: The construction industry accounts for nearly 40 per cent of energy-related CO2 emissions globally. We look at how nature-based solutions could shape the way we live in the future

programme.title: Rama O Rama
programme.desc: Years ago, Sandeep was separated from his brother. He falls in love with Hema and manipulates her family to force her to marry him. But Hema's boyfriend is none other than his own estranged brother

programme.title: Hum Se Na Takrana
programme.desc: Amar is an orphan who gets a family when Vijay's mother adopts him. He makes many sacrifices for Vijay and helps him become a policeman. But Vijay returns home to arrest Amar for theft and murder

programme.title: Mere Baap Pehle Aap
programme.desc: The story of a father who dreams of his son getting married to the girl next door. His son, however, wants his dad to marry the music teacher at the local school

programme.title: Sarphira
programme.desc: A spoilt young man does not have the ability to distinguish what is right and wrong. Consequently, he's drawn into a criminal life, with true love providing his only chance of redemption

programme.title: Kaala Sooraj
programme.desc: Karan is the ruthless leader of an underworld gang. Majeed, a smuggler, and Karan's associate Ranjeet join forces to assassinate him

programme.title: Agneepath
programme.desc: Vijay, a gangster, wants to defeat Kancha, who deceptively killed his father years ago. Vijay will go to any length to restore his family's honour and even earns his own mother's wrath in the process

programme.title: Chalte Chalte
programme.desc: A man pursues a woman who is already engaged and eventually gets married to her. Differences between the two lead to a bitter separation that threatens to destroy their relationship forever

programme.title: Singh Saab the Great
programme.desc: An ordinary man works as a tax collector in a small city, but a TV journalist uncovers the mysterious hero's colourful past

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: When a family moves into a haunted bungalow, a sudden turn of events leaves them astonished. Can they escape the possessed property?

programme.title: Xcuse Me
programme.desc: Chantu and Bantu fool a hotel manager and enrol as trainees. Soon they expose several corrupt staff and guests and also fall in love with the owner's daughters. But the fired employees seek revenge

programme.title: Chaahat
programme.desc: Roop and his father come to the city for medical treatment where Reshma falls in love with Roop. However, Roop loves Pooja but when Reshma threatens to kill herself, Roop agrees to marry her

programme.title: Ishkq in Paris
programme.desc: Akash and Ishkq meet on a train from Rome to Paris and spend the evening together. They cross paths once again in Paris

programme.title: Mehbooba
programme.desc: Shravan, a rich businessman, promises marriage to Payal but leaves after taking advantage of her. Later, Payal meets Karan, an artist, but her world falls apart when Shravan resurfaces

programme.title: Smuggler
programme.desc: Movie starring Dharmendra, Reena Roy and is directed by Ajay Kashyap

programme.title: Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna
programme.desc: Dev and Maya meet in the middle of their respective failing marriages. They become friends and try to help each other in salvaging their marriages but end up falling in love instead

programme.title: Phir Bhi Dil Hai Hindustani
programme.desc: Ajay Bakshi and Ria Banerji are two rival TV reporters and will stop at nothing to outdo each other. Finally, they team up to help a man seek justice for his daughter who was raped by a politician

programme.title: Kaal
programme.desc: A wildlife expert and a few tourists team up with a village chief in order to battle a supernatural entity responsible for killing several tourists

programme.title: Duniya
programme.desc: Mohan, an honest worker, is framed and arrested for his employer's murder. Now, Mohan's only goal in life is to seek revenge and bring the real culprits to justice. Will he succeed in his motive?

programme.title: Bedardi
programme.desc: When the money saved for Vijay's sister's wedding is stolen, he is in desperate need of cash and accepts a contract to kill, unaware that he is being set-up to kill his own brother

programme.title: Charitraheen
programme.desc: Indra and Rama fall in love, but things take an unexpected turn when he marries another woman

programme.title: Nastik
programme.desc: A young Shankar is outraged when his father is killed by Tiger, who also separates him from his mother and sister. Shankar grows up to be an atheist and vows revenge on Tiger

programme.title: Patiala House
programme.desc: Gattu loves playing cricket, but his cricket-hating father prevents him from living his dream. When he gets the chance to play for an English team, he is torn between his father and his passion

programme.title: Filmfare Awards 2020
programme.desc: The best talents from the Indian film industry receive acknowledgements and awards for their outstanding performances in a star-studded ceremony in 2020

programme.title: Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania
programme.desc: Kavya Pratap Singh is about to be married. But when she visits Delhi for her wedding shopping she meets Humpty Sharma, a light-hearted Delhite, and they fall in love

programme.title: Shootout At Lokhandwala
programme.desc: This is the story of a seasoned cop, Khan, who has fought extremists and teamed up with other cops in order to combat the trigger-happy gangsters in a residential locality of Mumbai

programme.title: Kidnap
programme.desc: Kabir is sent to jail for a crime that he committed to save his injured friend. In revenge he commits a kidnapping and masterminds a series of crimes

programme.title: Rama O Rama
programme.desc: Years ago, Sandeep was separated from his brother. He falls in love with Hema and manipulates her family to force her to marry him. But Hema's boyfriend is none other than his own estranged brother

programme.title: Laawaris
programme.desc: Captain Dada is a thug who terrorizes people in his area until he falls in love with Anshu. Desperate to convince her of his mended ways, he leaves the gang he has been a part of, inviting hostility

programme.title: Sanam Teri Kasam
programme.desc: After cheating many women, Vijay, a playboy, finally falls in love with Seema. However, the situation gets bizarre when Seema is tricked into marrying none other than Vijay's best friend, Gopal

programme.title: Deewana Mujh Sa Nahin
programme.desc: Anita and Ajay are colleagues. Ajay mistakes her friendship for love and gets obsessed with her. Anita realises this and sets out to clear the misunderstandings and soon falls in love with Ajay

programme.title: Mary Kom
programme.desc: A biopic that showcases the life and achievements of Olympic medal winning Indian boxer, Mary Kom

programme.title: Mirchi Top 20
programme.desc: Watch Bollywood and TV celebrities perform to the sizzling chart toppers of 2014

programme.title: OK Jaanu
programme.desc: Adi and Tara are ambitious people who fall in love after meeting at a wedding. They decide on a no-strings-attached live-in relationship, but doubt their decision when their careers pull them apart

programme.title: Airlift
programme.desc: Ranjit Katiyal, an Indian businessman, leads a happy and successful life in Kuwait with his family. However, when Iraq invades Kuwait, he decides to risk his life to save his stranded countrymen

programme.title: Ek Raaz
programme.desc: Beena falls in love with a man who has several avatars including a singer, an employee at her uncle's office and someone she meets at her to-be in-law's house. He impresses her, but can she trust him?

programme.title: Hum Se Hai Zamana
programme.desc: Shiva and Karan, two brothers, decide to bring the evil Thakur to justice to avenge their father's death. However, will Thakur be able to fight back when his own son and wife go against him?

programme.title: Paheli
programme.desc: A ghost falls in love with a newly-wed woman. He then follows her and takes on the guise of her husband while the latter is away on business

programme.title: Raanjhanaa
programme.desc: A small-town boy needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood sweetheart, who is in love with big city ideals

programme.title: Yugpurush
programme.desc: Anirudh is released from an asylum after twenty years of treatment. He struggles to adjust in the normal world. He finds comfort in Sunita's company, but his friend Ranjan also loves her

programme.title: Andaz Apna Apna
programme.desc: Amar and Prem belong to middle-class families but dream big. Gaiety ensues when they both vie to win over a multi-millionaire's daughter to become her inheritor

programme.title: Special 26
programme.desc: A group of cons pose as CBI officers and conduct bogus raids to loot politicians and businessmen. When the real CBI officers learn about this gang, they come up with a plan to catch them red-handed

programme.title: Main Hoon Na
programme.desc: To fulfil his father's dying wish of reuniting his family as well as on orders to protect the General's daughter, Major Ram goes undercover as a student. But, sinister events are about to unfold

programme.title: Surakshaa
programme.desc: Rivals Jagtap and Dhanraj are smitten by Kiran's diamond ring. While Laxman and Vikram go for Dhanraj, Jagtap enlists Raja. With a mysterious waiter thrown into the mix, everyone has their own agenda

programme.title: Saheb Biwi Aur Gangster Returns
programme.desc: When Aditya's wife cheats on him, he decides to take revenge. Meanwhile, Indrajeet Singh, a prince whose property was taken over by Aditya's family, returns to settle scores with Aditya

programme.title: Cinebuzz
programme.desc: The host interviews various media personalities and shares the latest news of the Bollywood industry

programme.title: Cinebuzz
programme.desc: The host interviews various media personalities and shares the latest news of the Bollywood industry

programme.title: Maahir
programme.desc: While spending several years in jail for drug smuggling, Kamini Rai gives birth to a baby boy, who is taken to an orphanage by a police inspector

programme.title: Shaandaar
programme.desc: In the backdrop of a destination wedding in London, two families try to save their respective empires, unbeknownst to each other

programme.title: Deedar
programme.desc: Sapna and her mother go missing on the day of Sapna's engagement. Her would-be-fiance Anand attempts to find her and know the reason behind it. However, he ends up putting everyone's life on the line

programme.title: Raja Saab
programme.desc: Prince Pratap Singh asks the ambitious Rajoo to impersonate him in front of Princess Poonam. The princess falls head over heels in love with Rajoo, unaware of his poor background

programme.title: Boss
programme.desc: Satyakant is an upright man of principles who banishes his son Surya after the boy makes some bad choices. Surya is taken under the wing of the transport king Big Boss

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: An Indian action drama film starring Akshay Kumar, Sidharth Malhotra and Jacqueline Fernandez. Directed by Karen Malhotra. Produced by Dharma Productions, Lionsgate Films and Endemol India

programme.title: Ek Raaz
programme.desc: Beena falls in love with a man who has several avatars including a singer, an employee at her uncle's office and someone she meets at her to-be in-law's house. He impresses her, but can she trust him?

programme.title: Prince
programme.desc: The story of a thief who, following a huge robbery, wakes up to realise that he has lost his memory and that his life is at stake

programme.title: Surakshaa
programme.desc: Rivals Jagtap and Dhanraj are smitten by Kiran's diamond ring. While Laxman and Vikram go for Dhanraj, Jagtap enlists Raja. With a mysterious waiter thrown into the mix, everyone has their own agenda

programme.title: Oh Darling Yeh Hai India
programme.desc: A gangster plans to take over the country by cloning the President. A boy and girl who are complete strangers to each other get wind of this conspiracy and try to save the country. Will they succeed?

programme.title: Kachche Dhaage
programme.desc: When Jai meets his stepbrother Aftab and stepmother Mariam, he develops an immediate hatred for them. However, he agrees to help Aftab to rescue Mariam after she is kidnapped

programme.title: Chaahat
programme.desc: Roop and his father come to the city for medical treatment where Reshma falls in love with Roop. However, Roop loves Pooja but when Reshma threatens to kill herself, Roop agrees to marry her

programme.title: Zor
programme.desc: When a police commissioner is accused of treachery, his son sets out to restore his father's dignity and pride

programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani is a love story packed with laughs. Prem's life philosophy is to spread joy and The Happy Club helps him in this mighty endeavour
